title: 10 best herbal essential oils for knee swelling
description: Yucca schidigera, also known as mojave yucca, essential oils helps with knee swelling because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's saponins, such as yucca saponins, have been shown to reduce inflammation and swelling by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes. Additionally, the essential oil's ability to reduce oxidative stress and promote healthy joint function can help alleviate knee swelling.
